seoTitle: Clearview vs Clements Gap — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clearview and Clements Gap. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clearview vs Clements Gap: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clearview and Clements Gap.
heading: Clearview vs Clements Gap — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clearview, South Australia and Clements Gap, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clearview has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Clements Gap (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clearview or Clements Gap safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clearview has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Clements Gap scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clearview scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Clements Gap scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clearview or Clements Gap?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clearview has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
